title: galium palustre var. congestum
intro: Galium palustre var. congestum, also known as Marsh Bedstraw or Short-stemmed Marsh Bedstraw, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and as a diuretic to reduce water retention. The health benefits of Galium palustre var. congestum include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
